name: 失踪商人的调查
style_description: European storybook illustration, hand-drawn line art, soft cel shading, whimsical fantasy, non-photorealistic, no text, no watermark

style_presets.medieval fantasy: medieval European fantasy, castles and villages, chainmail and leather
style_presets.xianxia: Chinese xianxia cultivation fantasy, flowing robes, misty mountains, ink-wash influence
style_presets.cyberpunk: cyberpunk neon city, rain-slick streets, holographic signs, high-tech low-life

location_descriptions.村口: A small fantasy village entrance at dawn, wooden gate, mist, wary guard post, muddy path
location_descriptions.酒馆: Cozy medieval tavern interior, fireplace, wooden tables, dim lantern light, worried patrons
location_descriptions.仓库: Abandoned merchant warehouse, broken crates, dim light through dusty windows, suspicious footprints
location_descriptions.森林小路: Dark forest trail, twisted trees, fog, hidden bandit ambush atmosphere

npc_visual_hints.托马斯: middle-aged village guard, chainmail, spear, suspicious stern face
npc_visual_hints.米拉: tavern keeper woman, apron, worried kind eyes, fireplace background
npc_visual_hints.艾琳娜: young sad merchant daughter, simple dress, tearful eyes, tavern setting
npc_visual_hints.瓦里克: bandit leader, scarred face, dark leather armor, forest road, menacing grin
